data.name: Hot Property
data.detailed_description:
Hot Property is a hilarious, no-holds-barred adult visual novel where the main character stumbles into a series of absurd, thrilling, and outrageously sexy situations. Here, physical attraction isn’t just part of the story – it is the story. Every encounter, every conversation, and every scene is designed to make you smile… and turn up the heat.

With charming characters, over-the-top scenarios, and a lighthearted tone that blends humor with high-voltage eroticism, Hot Property delivers a playful yet unforgettable experience where every choice you make can change the course of the story.

What’s included:

  • 280 high-quality animations

  • 2500  detailed images

  • 50,000 words of dialogue and scenes

  • Name your protagonist

  • Replay Gallery to relive your hottest moments

  • Original music and SFX for full immersion

Key Features:

  • A branching story with choices that shape your path and endings.

  • A comedic and surreal tone that makes every encounter memorable.

  • Unique, eccentric, and irresistibly sexy characters.

  • Multiple endings based on your decisions.

  • Lovingly illustrated sex scenes throughout the game.

  • Steam Achievements

In Hot Property, sex is everywhere, laughter is guaranteed… and your choices make all the difference.

data.short_description: A wild erotic comedy where sex is everywhere, the fun never stops, and your choices truly matter.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 義大利文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 法文, 德文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card with DX10 (shader model 4.0) capabilities
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
